content.subject: dedup — turn 2 re-delivery already ACK'd
content.body: Received re-delivery of infrastructure-verification turn 2 (transport materialization fix broadcast, 2026-03-11T18:05:00-05:00). Original ACK sent in from-mesh-001.json at turn 3 (2026-04-03T01:45:00Z). No new information to process. Filing as duplicate.

epistemic_flags: Re-delivery likely caused by cross_repo_fetch --materialize surfacing the message file again after the materialization fix itself deployed
